Even many of the brand’s latest Q Ultra and V Ultra series models are seeing notable offers right now, and you can save up to 40% by cashing in on these Prime Day deals right now. Pretty much everything from the brand’s compact gaming keyboards to full-size productivity models is discounted today, and we have highlighted some of our favorites below for you to check out.

items.title: Prime Day knocks Anker’s latest 45W Nano charger with smart display down to just $26 (All colors)
items.summary: As part of the ongoing Prime Day sale, Anker’s 45W Nano USB-C charger with smart display is down to $25.99 shipped. This is one of the brand’s popular GaN chargers, which typically goes for $40. While it’s been discounted a few times in the past, today’s Prime Day offer highlighted here takes $14 off its usual going rate to land it $2 below the previous all-time low it hit at Amazon during the Big Spring sale event. That makes this the best single-unit price we have tracked so far, outside of a short-lived two-pack offer that effectively brought each charger down to $25 directly at Anker, and the brand’s official storefront is offering all color variants of this unit down at the $26 low for Prime Day.

items.summary: As part of its now-live Amazon Prime Day event, the official Jackery storefront is offering its 1,070Wh Explorer 1000 v2 Portable Power Station down at $399.99 shipped, beating out the direct website, where it’s still keeping to its full $799 price. We’ve mostly seen this model keeping between $499 and $429 for most of 2026 after kicking off the year down at $399. While it has dipped slightly lower in the past, you’re still getting a solid $399 markdown here that beats out most the deals we’ve seen since Black Friday, especially direct from Jackery (as well as last week’s exclusive deal from Wellbots), landing just $51 above the low we last saw in November.
